title: Cryo-EM sample preparation for PI3KC3-C1~RAB1A complex
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8aa62","text":"This protocol details cryo-EM sample preparation for PI3KC3-C1~RAB1A complex.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Strip the protein of its bound divalent cations by incubating RAB1A(Q70L) with 5 millimolar (mM) EDTA at Room temperature for 00:30:00 .
Add a large molar excess ( 50 millimolar (mM) ) of GTP to the protein.
Incubate the mixture for an additional 00:30:00 to allow GTP loading.
Quench the reaction by adding 20 millimolar (mM) MgCl 2 at Room temperature for 00:20:00 .

Purify the GTP-loaded RAB1A through a PD-10 column equilibrated with a final buffer containing 25 millimolar (mM) HEPES pH 7.5 , 150 millimolar (mM) NaCl, 2 millimolar (mM) MgCl 2 , and 25 millimolar (mM) TCEP.
Prepare a 1:20 molar ratio of PI3KC3-C1 to RAB1A ( 0.55 micromolar (µM) PI3KC3-C1: 11 micromolar (µM) RAB1A).
Incubate the mixture for 01:00:00 at Room temperature to allow complex formation.
creator: Annan SI Cook
